rationale.R1.5: The revised passage presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the structural reorganization dimension.
rationale.R1.6: The rewritten text shows improved writing polish, with consistent register and no lost meaning, addressing the writing polish dimension.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, marking confidence and missing evidence, addressing the uncertainty disclosure dimension.
rationale.RX.3: The revised passage covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no scope drift, addressing the scope adherence dimension.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, identifying harmful patterns in the original, addressing the downstream-harm avoidance dimension.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing provenance and traceability, addressing the provenance and traceability dimension.
